notes: Intel business-PC platform combining CPU, chipset, and networking with AMT (Active Management Technology) for remote OOB management
Out-of-band hardware-level remote management embedded in Intel vPro chipsets; enables KVM/power/repair independent of OS state
Remote administration of endpoint PCs; ranges from SMS/SCCM to cloud-native Intune/Jamf/Kandji

tech_name: Intel quad-core and dual-core business CPUs
notes: 2008-era vPro was built on Intel Core 2 Duo/Quad; later moved to Core i5/i7 vPro SKUs
